description: Multi-tenant Nx monorepo with Angular 21 apps and Cloudflare Workers

stories.title: BaseNative showcase app deployment
stories.description: Deploy the BaseNative showcase application as a standalone Angular 21 app to Cloudflare Pages
acceptance: App deploys to Cloudflare Pages successfully
Production URL is accessible and responsive
Follows Nx monorepo conventions for build output
stories.verificationCommand: npm run build:basenative && npm run test:basenative

stories.title: Greenput CRM lead management flow
stories.description: Implement complete lead management flow in Greenput CRM app with list, create, edit, and delete operations
acceptance: Lead list displays all leads with pagination
Create lead form validates required fields

stories.title: Greenput deal tracking
stories.description: Create deal tracking module in Greenput app with status pipeline and notes
acceptance: Deal list view with status indicators

stories.title: Greenput treasury and sweep functionality
stories.description: Build treasury dashboard showing account balances, transaction history, and fund allocation

stories.title: API Worker endpoints — CRUD for leads
stories.description: Implement Cloudflare Workers API endpoints for lead CRUD operations with D1 persistence

stories.title: API Worker endpoints — consent receipts
stories.description: Implement consent receipt storage and retrieval via Workers API endpoints
acceptance: Query by user_id and date range supported

stories.title: Authentication flow — JWT tokens
stories.description: Implement JWT-based authentication with login, token refresh, and protected routes
acceptance: Token includes user_id and tenant_id claims

stories.title: Pact contract tests passing
stories.description: Establish and maintain Pact contract tests between Angular apps and Workers APIs
acceptance: Pact files exist for all API contracts

stories.title: MSW mock handlers matching OpenAPI spec
stories.description: Create Mock Service Worker (MSW) handlers that align with OpenAPI specification
acceptance: MSW handlers cover all OpenAPI endpoints

stories.title: Multi-tenant data isolation
stories.description: Implement data isolation at database and application layers for multi-tenant support
acceptance: Tenant ID required in all requests
